requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (TCVN IEC 62471 Risk Groups)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（TCVN IEC 62471 危险组别）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（TCVN IEC 62471 危險組別）

summary.en: Vietnam addresses photobiological safety of lamps and luminaires through TCVN IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), the Vietnamese adoption of IEC 62471. The standard classifies products into risk groups from RG0 (Exempt — no hazard) through RG1 (low), RG2 (moderate), to RG3 (high risk), based on blue-light-weighted radiance and irradiance limits. For general LED lighting, risk-group classification and documentation support the overall safety case. Whether RG classification/testing is a mandatory line item under the applicable QCVN regulation or a supporting TCVN standard depends on the current QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN scope and the product type — for many general-purpose luminaires the photobiological standard operates as a referenced TCVN rather than a standalone mandatory rule. RG2 and RG3 products carry usage restrictions and warnings and should be declared in the conformity dossier.
summary.zh: 越南通过 TCVN IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）处理灯和灯具的光生物安全，即越南采用的 IEC 62471。该标准依据蓝光加权辐亮度和辐照度限值，将产品分为 RG0（豁免——无危害）至 RG1（低）、RG2（中等）、RG3（高危险）危险组别。对于通用 LED 照明，危险组别分类及文件记录支持整体安全论证。RG 分类/检测属于适用 QCVN 法规的强制项目还是支持性 TCVN 标准，取决于现行 QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN 范围及产品类型——对许多通用灯具而言，光生物标准以引用 TCVN 形式运作，而非独立强制规则。RG2 和 RG3 产品存在使用限制及警告，应在合格卷宗中声明。
summary.zht: 越南通過 TCVN IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）處理燈和燈具的光生物安全，即越南採用的 IEC 62471。該標準依據藍光加權輻亮度和輻照度限值，將產品分為 RG0（豁免——無危害）至 RG1（低）、RG2（中等）、RG3（高危險）危險組別。對於通用 LED 照明，危險組別分類及文件記錄支持整體安全論證。RG 分類/檢測屬於適用 QCVN 法規的強制項目還是支持性 TCVN 標準，取決於現行 QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN 範圍及產品類型——對許多通用燈具而言，光生物標準以引用 TCVN 形式運作，而非獨立強制規則。RG2 和 RG3 產品存在使用限制及警告，應在合格卷宗中聲明。

standards_or_laws: TCVN IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (Vietnamese adoption of IEC 62471; risk-group classification basis)
QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN — National technical regulation framework (scope of mandatory photobiological assessment to be confirmed for the specific product)

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which is technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market. Enforcement and testing obligations are less prescriptive for residential luminaires. Because both the Vietnamese TCVN IEC 62471 and Chinese GB/T 20145 derive from IEC 62471, the risk-group methodology and limits are largely common.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制要求。对居民灯具的执行及检测义务规定不够严格。由于越南 TCVN IEC 62471 与中国 GB/T 20145 均源自 IEC 62471，危险组别方法及限值基本共通。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制要求。對居民燈具的執行及檢測義務規定不夠嚴格。由於越南 TCVN IEC 62471 與中國 GB/T 20145 均源自 IEC 62471，危險組別方法及限值基本共通。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard)

gap.en: TCVN IEC 62471 and GB/T 20145 share the IEC 62471 technical base, so risk-group test methods and limits transfer well — a product already assessed to GB/T 20145 has comparable underlying evidence. The practical gaps are: (1) document a defensible risk-group assessment in the Vietnamese conformity dossier acceptable to the designated body, rather than relying solely on a Chinese GB/T 20145 report; (2) confirm whether photobiological classification is a mandatory line item within the applicable QCVN scope for the specific product or a supporting TCVN; (3) RG2 luminaires must carry warnings and usage instructions in Vietnamese, and RG3 products face significant market restrictions (typically professional/industrial use). Most general-purpose LED luminaires target RG0 or RG1 with no usage restriction, but the classification should be formally recorded. Note that China's GB/T 20145 references the older IEC 62471:2006 edition, so confirm the Vietnamese TCVN edition and any updates.
gap.zh: TCVN IEC 62471 与 GB/T 20145 共享 IEC 62471 技术基础，危险组别试验方法及限值易于迁移——已按 GB/T 20145 评估的产品底层证据相当。实务差距为：（1）在越南合格卷宗中记录指定机构可接受的可辩护危险组别评估，而非仅依赖中国 GB/T 20145 报告；（2）确认光生物分类对具体产品是否为适用 QCVN 范围内的强制项目，还是支持性 TCVN；（3）RG2 灯具须附越南语警告及使用说明，RG3 产品面临重大市场限制（通常为专业/工业用途）。大多数通用 LED 灯具面向 RG0 或 RG1，无使用限制，但分类应正式记录。注意中国 GB/T 20145 引用较旧的 IEC 62471:2006 版本，请确认越南 TCVN 版本及任何更新。
gap.zht: TCVN IEC 62471 與 GB/T 20145 共享 IEC 62471 技術基礎，危險組別試驗方法及限值易於遷移——已按 GB/T 20145 評估的產品底層證據相當。實務差距為：（1）在越南合格卷宗中記錄指定機構可接受的可辯護危險組別評估，而非僅依賴中國 GB/T 20145 報告；（2）確認光生物分類對具體產品是否為適用 QCVN 範圍內的強制項目，還是支持性 TCVN；（3）RG2 燈具須附越南語警告及使用說明，RG3 產品面臨重大市場限制（通常為專業/工業用途）。大多數通用 LED 燈具面向 RG0 或 RG1，無使用限制，但分類應正式記錄。注意中國 GB/T 20145 引用較舊的 IEC 62471:2006 版本，請確認越南 TCVN 版本及任何更新。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — photobiological risk-group classification per TCVN IEC 62471 supports the safety case; whether it is a mandatory line item for the specific product under the applicable QCVN scope must be confirmed with the designated certification body
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not universally prescribed

source.publisher: Ministry of Science and Technology (MOST/STAMEQ), Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological risk-group classification for LED products in Vietnam rests on TCVN IEC 62471 (IEC 62471 adoption). Whether classification/testing is a mandatory QCVN line item or a supporting TCVN should be confirmed for the specific product with the designated certification body. The technical base is common with China's recommended GB/T 20145, so prior assessment transfers, but the Vietnamese conformity dossier should document the risk group, and RG2/RG3 products require Vietnamese-language warnings and may face usage restrictions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 越南 LED 产品的光生物危险组别分类以 TCVN IEC 62471（采用 IEC 62471）为基础。分类/检测对具体产品是否为 QCVN 强制项目还是支持性 TCVN，应与指定认证机构确认。技术基础与中国推荐性 GB/T 20145 共通，既有评估可迁移，但越南合格卷宗应记录危险组别，RG2/RG3 产品须附越南语警告并可能面临使用限制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 越南 LED 產品的光生物危險組別分類以 TCVN IEC 62471（採用 IEC 62471）為基礎。分類/檢測對具體產品是否為 QCVN 強制項目還是支持性 TCVN，應與指定認證機構確認。技術基礎與中國推薦性 GB/T 20145 共通，既有評估可遷移，但越南合格卷宗應記錄危險組別，RG2/RG3 產品須附越南語警告並可能面臨使用限制。

requirement_topic.en: Self-Ballasted LED Lamp Performance and Safety — TCVN IEC 62560 / 62612
requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯性能与安全——TCVN IEC 62560 / 62612
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈性能與安全——TCVN IEC 62560 / 62612

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps (LED bulbs with integrated control gear, more than 50 V) intended for the Vietnam market are assessed against TCVN IEC 62560 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — safety specifications), the Vietnamese adoption of IEC 62560, with TCVN IEC 62612 covering performance requirements where applicable. TCVN IEC 62560 specifies marking, dimensions, protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and electric strength, mechanical strength, cap temperature rise, resistance to heat and fire, and fault conditions for retrofit LED lamps. These TCVN safety/performance standards support conformity within the QCVN/CR framework and, together with the lamp-level photobiological assessment (TCVN IEC 62471), form the lamp safety case. Confirm the exact mandatory scope and CR-mark requirement for the specific lamp type with the designated certification body and the current QCVN regulation.
summary.zh: 面向越南市场的自镇流 LED 灯（带集成控制装置、电压大于 50 V 的 LED 灯泡）须依据 TCVN IEC 62560（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求）评定，即越南采用的 IEC 62560；适用时由 TCVN IEC 62612 涵盖性能要求。TCVN IEC 62560 规定改型 LED 灯的标志、尺寸、防触电、绝缘电阻和电气强度、机械强度、灯头温升、耐热和耐火及故障条件。这些 TCVN 安全/性能标准支持 QCVN/CR 框架内的合格评定，并与灯级光生物评估（TCVN IEC 62471）共同构成灯的安全论证。请就具体灯型与指定认证机构及现行 QCVN 法规确认确切的强制范围及 CR 标志要求。
summary.zht: 面向越南市場的自鎮流 LED 燈（帶集成控制裝置、電壓大於 50 V 的 LED 燈泡）須依據 TCVN IEC 62560（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求）評定，即越南採用的 IEC 62560；適用時由 TCVN IEC 62612 涵蓋性能要求。TCVN IEC 62560 規定改型 LED 燈的標誌、尺寸、防觸電、絕緣電阻和電氣強度、機械強度、燈頭溫升、耐熱和耐火及故障條件。這些 TCVN 安全/性能標準支持 QCVN/CR 框架內的合格評定，並與燈級光生物評估（TCVN IEC 62471）共同構成燈的安全論證。請就具體燈型與指定認證機構及現行 QCVN 法規確認確切的強制範圍及 CR 標誌要求。

standards_or_laws: TCVN IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage above 50 V — Safety specifications (Vietnamese adoption of IEC 62560)
TCVN IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements (where applicable)

summary.en: China's equivalent for self-ballasted LED lamp safety is GB 24906-2010 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage more than 50 V — Safety requirements), aligned with IEC 62560, complemented by GB/T 24908 (performance) for retrofit LED lamps. Self-ballasted LED lamps in certain categories are subject to CCC certification administered through CNCA-authorised bodies (e.g. CQC). Chinese GB/CCC lamp reports are not automatically accepted under the Vietnamese QCVN/CR conformity pathway, although the IEC 62560 technical base is shared.
summary.zh: 中国对应的自镇流 LED 灯安全标准为 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用电压大于 50 V 自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求），与 IEC 62560 对齐，并由 GB/T 24908（性能）补充改型 LED 灯要求。特定类别的自镇流 LED 灯须经 CNCA 授权机构（如 CQC）进行 CCC 认证。中国 GB/CCC 灯报告不自动被越南 QCVN/CR 合格路径所接受，尽管共享 IEC 62560 技术基础。
summary.zht: 中國對應的自鎮流 LED 燈安全標準為 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用電壓大於 50 V 自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求），與 IEC 62560 對齊，並由 GB/T 24908（性能）補充改型 LED 燈要求。特定類別的自鎮流 LED 燈須經 CNCA 授權機構（如 CQC）進行 CCC 認證。中國 GB/CCC 燈報告不自動被越南 QCVN/CR 合格路徑所接受，儘管共享 IEC 62560 技術基礎。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906-2010 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage more than 50 V — Safety requirements (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 62560)
GB/T 24908 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: TCVN IEC 62560 and China's GB 24906 are both IEC 62560-derived, so the lamp safety engineering is largely common and prior testing transfers technically. The gaps are procedural and documentary: (1) Vietnamese conformity is assessed against the QCVN/CR framework through a designated certification body — a Chinese GB 24906 report or CCC certificate is not automatically accepted; (2) the in-country importer must hold the conformity dossier and arrange the CR mark where the lamp type is in QCVN scope; (3) performance claims (lumen output, efficacy) tie back to the MOIT MEPS and energy-label obligations (see ledvn-ecodesign) and must use Vietnamese-accepted test reports; (4) marking and instructions must be in Vietnamese. Confirm the exact mandatory scope for the specific lamp configuration, since coverage can differ between retrofit lamps and integrated luminaires. The shared IEC base reduces engineering rework but not the separate Vietnamese conformity, labelling, and CR-mark steps.
gap.zh: TCVN IEC 62560 与中国 GB 24906 均源自 IEC 62560，灯的安全工程基本共通，既有检测在技术上可迁移。差距为程序及文件性：（1）越南合格评定依 QCVN/CR 框架经指定认证机构进行——中国 GB 24906 报告或 CCC 证书不自动被接受；（2）境内进口商须持有合格卷宗，并在灯型属 QCVN 范围时安排 CR 标志；（3）性能声明（光通量、光效）与 MOIT MEPS 及能效标签义务挂钩（见 ledvn-ecodesign），须使用越南可接受的检测报告；（4）标志及说明须为越南语。请就具体灯具配置确认确切的强制范围，因改型灯与集成灯具的覆盖范围可能不同。共享的 IEC 基础减少工程返工，但不减少越南单独的合格、标签及 CR 标志步骤。
gap.zht: TCVN IEC 62560 與中國 GB 24906 均源自 IEC 62560，燈的安全工程基本共通，既有檢測在技術上可遷移。差距為程序及文件性：（1）越南合格評定依 QCVN/CR 框架經指定認證機構進行——中國 GB 24906 報告或 CCC 證書不自動被接受；（2）境內進口商須持有合格卷宗，並在燈型屬 QCVN 範圍時安排 CR 標誌；（3）性能聲明（光通量、光效）與 MOIT MEPS 及能效標籤義務掛鈎（見 ledvn-ecodesign），須使用越南可接受的檢測報告；（4）標誌及說明須為越南語。請就具體燈具配置確認確切的強制範圍，因改型燈與集成燈具的覆蓋範圍可能不同。共享的 IEC 基礎減少工程返工，但不減少越南單獨的合格、標籤及 CR 標誌步驟。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional/Mandatory by scope — TCVN IEC 62560 safety (and TCVN IEC 62612 performance where applicable) apply to self-ballasted LED lamps; CR-mark conformity is required where the lamp type falls within the applicable QCVN scope — confirm with the designated certification body
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory by category — GB 24906-2010 applies; CCC certification required for self-ballasted LED lamps in CNCA-covered categories

source.publisher: Ministry of Science and Technology (MOST/STAMEQ), Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamp safety in Vietnam rests on TCVN IEC 62560 (with TCVN IEC 62612 for performance), sharing the IEC 62560 base with China's GB 24906. Prior testing transfers technically, but Vietnamese conformity through a designated body, the CR mark where in scope, Vietnamese-language marking, and the MOIT energy-label tie-in are separate obligations not satisfied by a Chinese GB report or CCC certificate. Confirm the exact mandatory scope for the specific lamp configuration with the designated certification body.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 越南自镇流 LED 灯安全以 TCVN IEC 62560（性能由 TCVN IEC 62612 补充）为基础，与中国 GB 24906 共享 IEC 62560 基础。既有检测技术上可迁移，但经指定机构的越南合格评定、范围内的 CR 标志、越南语标志及 MOIT 能效标签衔接均为独立义务，不被中国 GB 报告或 CCC 证书满足。请就具体灯具配置与指定认证机构确认确切的强制范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 越南自鎮流 LED 燈安全以 TCVN IEC 62560（性能由 TCVN IEC 62612 補充）為基礎，與中國 GB 24906 共享 IEC 62560 基礎。既有檢測技術上可遷移，但經指定機構的越南合格評定、範圍內的 CR 標誌、越南語標誌及 MOIT 能效標籤銜接均為獨立義務，不被中國 GB 報告或 CCC 證書滿足。請就具體燈具配置與指定認證機構確認確切的強制範圍。
